ranked_movies.title: The Thing
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently cited as a top-tier horror film with legendary practical effects. Multiple comments praise its body horror and iconic scenes, placing it on numerous 'best of' lists.

ranked_movies.title: Alien
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently mentioned as a favorite and one of the best monster movies. Discussed for its terrifying premise and design, often appearing in top 5 lists.

ranked_movies.title: Hereditary
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended as a modern horror masterpiece that deeply disturbed viewers. Mentioned for its intense scenes and lasting psychological impact.

ranked_movies.title: The Exorcist
ranked_movies.reason: Described as a timeless classic that remains terrifying even 50 years later. Frequently listed as a top horror film and a benchmark for the genre.

ranked_movies.title: The Ring
ranked_movies.reason: Often discussed as a film that profoundly scared viewers, with many citing it as the reason for nightmares and changed behaviors. Its cultural impact is significant.

ranked_movies.title: The Shining
ranked_movies.reason: A staple in horror discussions, frequently appearing in top 5 lists. Praised for its atmosphere and direction.

ranked_movies.title: Sinister
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted for its effective sound design and ability to scare audiences in theaters. Mentioned as a film that gave viewers chills.

ranked_movies.title: Event Horizon
ranked_movies.reason: Noted for its intense and crazy scenes, often compared to 'Dead Space'. Discussed as a terrifying sci-fi horror experience.

ranked_movies.title: Cabin in the Woods
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a fun and meta horror film. Praised for its unique premise and chaotic finale.

ranked_movies.title: The Descent
ranked_movies.reason: Called a brilliant and absolutely terrifying film. Frequently recommended for its claustrophobic atmosphere and effective scares.

ranked_movies.title: It Follows
ranked_movies.reason: Praised for its terrifying concept and brilliant filmmaking. Discussed for its unique approach to horror and background scares.

ranked_movies.title: Weapons
ranked_movies.reason: A recent release that generated significant discussion. Described as a great horror movie with a unique format, though its tonal shift was divisive.

ranked_movies.title: Midsommar
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a favorite for its disturbing themes and unique setting. Noted for its impact on viewers' perspectives.

ranked_movies.title: The Autopsy of Jane Doe
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended as a top-tier scary movie with a great atmosphere and slow burn. Appears on multiple 'best of' lists.

ranked_movies.title: Halloween
ranked_movies.reason: The original is cited as THE classic slasher film. A foundational text in the genre that is frequently recommended.

ranked_movies.title: Evil Dead
ranked_movies.reason: Both the original and the 2013 remake are discussed. The remake is noted for its gruesome theater experience and intense reactions.

ranked_movies.title: Rosemary's Baby
ranked_movies.reason: A classic frequently mentioned in the same breath as other greats like 'The Exorcist'. Praised for its psychological horror.

ranked_movies.title: Bring Her Back
ranked_movies.reason: A recent A24 film discussed as a potential best horror of the year. Praised for its intensity, originality, and chilling scenes.

ranked_movies.title: Salem's Lot
ranked_movies.reason: The 1979 version is highlighted for its incredible atmosphere and one of the creepiest scenes ever filmed. A classic TV movie with a lasting impact.

ranked_movies.title: Scream
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a fun horror franchise and a great example of the slasher genre. Often recommended for its meta-commentary and entertainment value.
